{{Quote|In a spear-to-claw battle, it would take at least five Panshee warriors to defeat a Yootak. For a lone warrior to kill one, it would take cunning and intelligence. Luckily, I possess a great deal of both.|Grael, to Ponto|<ref name="escape" />}}
The '''Panshee''', also known as '''Tribe Panshee''', or the '''Panshee Tribe''', were a tribe of [[Ewok/Legends|Ewoks]] on the [[Forest/Legends|forest]] [[Moon/Legends|moon]] of [[Endor/Legends|Endor]] who followed the [[Way of the Tree Spirits]]. [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] and later [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] [[Agent/Legends|agent]] [[Grael]] the Ewok was one the tribe's most respected members.

==History==
A tribe of [[Ewok/Legends|Ewoks]] known as the Panshee resided on the [[Forest/Legends|forest]] [[Moon/Legends|moon]] of [[Endor/Legends|Endor]] by the [[Time/Legends|time]] of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], following the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]]<ref name="SWG" /> in [[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]].<ref name="NEC">''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''</ref> The tribe were enemies of several tribes of [[Dulok/Legends|Duloks]], including the [[Donkuwah]], [[Korga]] and [[Pubam]]. The Panshee also opposed the [[Sanyassan Marauders]], a band of [[Sanyassan/Legends|Sanyassan]] [[Pirate/Legends|pirates]] which had crash landed on the moon. Another tribe of Ewoks, known as the [[Gondula]], were allied with the Panshee.<ref name="SWG" /> The Panshee Tribe practiced the [[Way of the Tree Spirits]], a [[Deity/Legends|pantheistic]] Ewok [[The Force/Legends|Force]] tradition and [[Ewok religion|religion]].<ref name="escape" /> Their tribe consisted of a varied caste of Ewoks, including [[Chief/Legends|chiefs]], [[Matriarch/Legends|matriarchs]], [[loremaster]]s, [[ritualist]]s, [[Shaman/Legends|shamans]],<ref name="SWG" /> [[Soldier/Legends|warriors]]<ref name="escape" /> and ordinary workers. Members of the tribe made use of several types of weapons, including [[Ewok crossbow]]s, wooden [[Staff/Legends|staffs]], [[reinforced combat staff]]s,<ref name="SWG" /> and [[Spear/Legends|spears]].<ref name="escape" />

They operated out of several camps and [[Tree/Legends|tree]] villages. Two such villages were the [[Ewok Tree Village (central)|Central]] and [[Ewok Tree Village (southeast)|Southeast Panshee Ewok Villages]].<ref name="SWG" /> The [[Tribe Panshee village]] was another such tree village, which was the home of [[Grael]] the Ewok, [[Gender/Legends|his]] [[Grael's wife|wife]], and their son [[Ponto]].<ref name="escape" /> As one of the leading members of his tribe,<ref name="aj" /> the [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]] Grael became involved with the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] and the subsequent [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] in [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]].<ref name="escape" />

==Behind the scenes==
The Panshee first appeared in ''[[Escape from Balis-Baurgh]]'', a short story written by [[Paul Balsamo]] that was that was originally published in [[Star Wars Adventure Journal 1|''Star Wars Adventure Journal'' 1]] by [[West End Games]] in [[February]] [[1997]].<ref name="escape" /> They were later included as a non-playable [[W:c:swg:Faction|faction]] in the [[2003]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] [[Star Wars Galaxies|''Star Wars Galaxies: An Empire Divided'']], a [[Roleplaying game|massively multiplayer online role-playing game]] developed by [[Sony]] Online Entertainment and published by [[LucasArts]], prior to its closure on [[December 15]], [[2011]].<ref name="SWG" /><ref name="Shutdown">{{SonyCite|url=playerinfo|text=IMPORTANT INFORMATION ABOUT ''STAR WARS'' GALAXIES™}}</ref>
